/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libfranka_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libfranka_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/franka_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/franka_msgs/action/detail/grasp__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/franka_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/franka_msgs/action/detail/homing__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/franka_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/franka_msgs/action/detail/move__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/franka_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/franka_msgs/msg/detail/errors__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/franka_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/franka_msgs/msg/detail/grasp_epsilon__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/franka_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/franka_msgs/msg/detail/franka_robot_state__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libaction_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libunique_identifier_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
